title: ocotea holdridgeana
intro: Ocotea holdridgeana, also known as Costa Rican sassafras, is a tropical evergreen tree native to the cloud forests of Costa Rica. The bark and roots of Ocotea holdridgeana contain essential oils with medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Ocotea holdridgeana include potential relief from digestive issues, anxiety, and stress, as well as anti-inflammatory effects that may aid in pain relief and improve overall well-being. In herbal preparations, Ocotea holdridgeana is often used in teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be consumed or applied topically under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.
